wastewater_standard: EPA 2021 CoP Domestic Waste Water Treatment Systems (PE ≤10) + S.R. 66:2015; site assessment required
separation_distance_m: 16 m between opposing habitable-room windows above ground floor; 2.3 m between side walls
private_open_space: Houses 20/30/40/50 m² by beds (1/2/3/4+); apartments 4-9 m²
public_open_space_pct: 10% min - 15% max of net site area
car_parking_dwelling: House 1-1.5 (TC) / 1-2 per unit; Apartment 0.5-1 (TC) / 1-1.5 per unit
trigger_AA: Not enumerated in Chapter 33 (in environmental chapters/statutory AA)
trigger_EIA: Not enumerated in Chapter 33 (in environmental chapters/statutory SEA)
trigger_FRA: Sequential approach; site-specific FRA may be required; Justification Test in exceptional circumstances
trigger_AHIA: Built-heritage chapter (not in Chapter 33); guide to development in historic streetscapes
trigger_EcIA: Biodiversity Net Gain on sites 0.5 ha and over (ecological surveys)
trigger_TTA: TTA per 2014 Guidelines + Road Safety Audit; TTA may be required for retail over 1,000 sq.m
notes: DM Standards chapter sets no numeric rural site area or density (governed by Compact Settlements Guidelines 2024). Family flat ≤70 sqm. Daylight/sunlight assessment per BRE Guide 209 (2022). Design Statement required for all single rural houses + multi-unit housing.
